status_quo: Transaction-fee revenue overstated by 9% because refund reversals post to a separate ledger 48 hours after settlement. Finance reports net revenue that never reconciles to bank deposits.
with_bayesiq: BayesIQ joins settlement files with refund ledgers in near real time. The governed pipeline flagged 5 reconciliation breaks across 2 payment rails — giving treasury a clear remediation path before month-end close.
